top3.sql:
SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.Admission IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS WasAdmitted
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) >= 50
  AND l.RBC NOT BETWEEN 4.0 AND 5.5;

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.Admission IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS WasAdmitted
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) >= 50
  AND l.RBC NOT BETWEEN 4.0 AND 5.5;

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.Admission IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS WasAdmitted
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) >= 50
  AND (l.RBC < 3.5 OR l.RBC > 5.0);

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.Admission IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS WasAdmitted
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) >= 50
  AND (l.RBC < 4.0 OR l.RBC > 5.5);

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.Admission IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS WasAdmitted
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) >= 50
  AND l.RBC NOT BETWEEN 4.0 AND 5.5;

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.Admission IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS WasAdmitted
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) >= 50
  AND (l.RBC < 3.5 OR l.RBC > 5.0);

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.Admission
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) >= 50
  AND l.RBC != 'normal';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.Admission IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS WasAdmitted
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) >= 50
  AND l.RBC NOT BETWEEN 4.0 AND 5.5;
